AroundCities 

* Table: cards (major table for all the items shown in the web)
    * Id: auto generated 
    * Type: event/photo/registration/food
    * Status: active/inactive/obsolete
	* Priority: 0-100 (smaller is higher priority)
    * Parent Id: if it's a child event, put the parent card id here 
* Table: events (event related card will have records in here)
    * Event id: auto generated 
    * Card id: reference to cards
    * Title 
    * Description 
    * location 
    * Start date (date only)
    * End date (date only)
    * Organiser 
    * Source link : url
    * Source screenshot url: store the screenshot as proof its posted 
	* Source remarks: free text
* Table: event_schedules 
    * Event schedule id: auto generated 
    * Event id: reference to events table
	* Event Date: the actual day of the event (means one event could have multipl records here)
    * Start time (time only) 
    * End time (time only) 
* Table: event_programs 
    * Event program id: auto generated 
    * Event schedule id: reference to event schedules table
	* Title ( Singing competition at KCH food fest, happens only at 10 June. starting from 7pm until 10pm, where KCH food fest starts from 5PM until 11PM )
	* Description 
    * Start time (time only) 
    * End time (time only) 
    * Organiser 
	* Photo url: if there are any poster related only to that single program, can use it here
    * Source link : some events are promoted seperately for each program, can put it here.
    * Source type: fb/newspaper
    * Source screenshot url: store the screenshot as proof its posted 
* Table: photos (can be use by any card type, for example, event photos, registration photos etc)
    * Photo id: auto generated 
    * Card id: reference to cards
    * Photo URL 
    * Title
    * Description: optional 
    * Location 
    * Captured date
    * Captured by
* Table: positive_messages
    * Greeting Id:auto generated
    * Card id: reference to cards 
    * Description 
* Table: positive_messages
    * Greeting Id:auto generated
    * Card id: reference to cards 
    * Description 
* Table: translates
    * Card id: reference to cards
    * Language: ch/bm
    * Field name
    * Translated text
* Table: card visit stat
    * Card id: reference to cards
    * stat_date
    * stat_hour
    * view_count
    * click_count

Note: All table should auto includes created date, created by, updated date, updated by
